plugin.name: Solao_Explorer
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Records rooms/exits as you walk; tracks coverage; exports mermaid + JSON maps
plugin.description:
Explorer -- builds a map of each area from GMCP as YOU walk it. Records every room's name and exits, shows how much of the current area you've covered and which exits still lead somewhere new, and exports a mermaid flowchart (a gaardian-style map doc) + raw JSON per area.
It only records what you walk into -- it never moves you. Needs the GMCP handler.
explore show/hide the window explore mermaid write the current area's mermaid map to a file explore json write the current area's data to a JSON file explore new list rooms in this area that still have unexplored exits explore list list every area you've recorded explore clear forget the current area (asks to confirm) explore help this

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize" require "json"
local GMCP = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" local win = GetPluginID() local TITLE = "Explorer" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?"
local cfg -- { areas = { [zone] = { name, rooms = { [id] = {name, exits={dir=dest}} } } }, font, size } local last_msg = "-"
local function defaults () return { areas = {}, font = "Lucida Console", size = 9 } end
local COL = { bg=ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar=ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), btn=ColourNameToRGB("#1b2540"), hover=ColourNameToRGB("#274060"), text=ColourNameToRGB("#e6e6e6"), dim=ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent=ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), ok=ColourNameToRGB("#3ad07a"), border=ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), } local PAD, ROW_H, MINW = 6, 20, 210 local hovered = nil local L = { width = MINW }
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- gmcp ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function gmcp (what) local rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpdata_as_string", what) if rc ~= 0 then rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpval", what) end if not val or val == "" then return nil end local ret if not pcall(function() assert(loadstring("ret = "..val))() end) then return nil end return ret end
local function cur_zone () return gmcp("room.info.zone") end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- record the room we're standing in (only what we walk into) ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function record () local r = gmcp("room.info") if not r or not r.num then return end local zone = r.zone or "(unknown)" local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then a = { name = zone, rooms = {} }; cfg.areas[zone] = a end local id = tostring(r.num) local room = a.rooms[id] or {} room.name = r.name or room.name room.exits = {} for dir, dest in pairs(r.exits or {}) do room.exits[dir] = tostring(dest) end a.rooms[id] = room end
-- coverage of a zone: rooms recorded, and exits that point to a room we haven't recorded local function coverage (zone) local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then return 0, 0 end local rooms, unexplored = 0, {} for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do rooms = rooms + 1 for _, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not a.rooms[dest] and not unexplored[dest] then unexplored[dest] = true end end end local n = 0; for _ in pairs(unexplored) do n = n + 1 end return rooms, n end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- exports ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function safe (s) return (s or "area"):gsub("[^%w]+", "_") end local function plugin_dir () return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) end
local function build_mermaid (zone) local a = cfg.areas[zone] if not a then return nil end local nodes = {} for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do nodes[id] = room.name or "?" end for _, room in pairs(a.rooms) do for _, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not nodes[dest] then nodes[dest] = "?" end -- unexplored neighbor end end local out = { "```mermaid", "flowchart TD" } for id, label in pairs(nodes) do out[#out+1] = " r"..id..'["'..label:gsub('"', "'")..'"]' end for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do for dir, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do out[#out+1] = " r"..id.." -->|"..dir.."| r"..dest end end out[#out+1] = "```" return table.concat(out, "\n") end
local function write_file (path, text) local f = io.open(path, "w") if not f then return false end f:write(text); f:close() return true end
local function export_mermaid (zone) if not zone or not cfg.areas[zone] then last_msg = "no data for this area"; return end local path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(zone)..".md" local rooms = coverage(zone) local body = "# "..zone.."\n\n"..rooms.." rooms recorded.\n\n"..build_mermaid(zone).."\n" last_msg = write_file(path, body) and ("mermaid -> map_"..safe(zone)..".md") or "write failed" ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg) end
local function export_json (zone) if not zone or not cfg.areas[zone] then last_msg = "no data for this area"; return end local path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(zone)..".json" last_msg = write_file(path, json.encode(cfg.areas[zone])) and ("json -> map_"..safe(zone)..".json") or "write failed" ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg) end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- GMCP broadcast: record on room change ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginBroadcast (msg, id, name, text) if id == GMCP and text == "room.info" then record(); paint() end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- rendering ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local BUTTONS = { { key="mermaid", label="Export Mermaid map" }, { key="json", label="Export JSON" }, { key="new", label="Show unexplored exits" }, { key="list", label="List recorded areas" }, } local function fw (s) return WindowTextWidth(win, "f", s) end
local function layout_metrics () L.fh = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 L.title_h = L.fh + PAD local w = WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE) + fw(" v"..PVER) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do w = math.max(w, fw(b.label)) end w = math.max(w, fw("Area: Some Long Area Name Here")) L.width = math.max(MINW, w + PAD*2 + 12) L.rows = {} local y = L.title_h + PAD/2 for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do L.rows[b.key] = y; y = y + ROW_H end L.foot_y = y + PAD/2 L.height = L.foot_y + (L.fh * 3) + PAD end
function paint () if not L.rows then return end WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h, COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) WindowText(win, "f", " v"..PVER, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"fb",TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim)
for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] local bg = (hovered == "ex_"..b.key) and COL.hover or COL.btn WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, bg) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, COL.border) WindowText(win, "f", b.label, PAD+5, y+3, 0, 0, COL.text) end
local zone = cur_zone() local rooms, unexp = coverage(zone) local y = L.foot_y WindowText(win, "f", "Area: ", PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "fb", zone or "-", PAD + fw("Area: "), y, 0, 0, COL.ok) y = y + L.fh + 1 WindowText(win, "f", "Rooms: "..rooms.." Unexplored exits: "..unexp, PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) y = y + L.fh + 1 WindowText(win, "f", last_msg, PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim)
WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, L.width-1, L.height-1, COL.border) WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") end
local function show_unexplored (zone) local a = zone and cfg.areas[zone] if not a then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: no data for this area"); return end ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: rooms with unexplored exits in "..zone..":") for id, room in pairs(a.rooms) do local outs = {} for dir, dest in pairs(room.exits or {}) do if not a.rooms[dest] then outs[#outs+1] = dir end end if #outs > 0 then ColourNote("silver",""," "..(room.name or id).." ("..id.."): "..table.concat(outs, " ")) end end end
local function list_areas () local any = false for zone in pairs(cfg.areas) do local r = coverage(zone) ColourNote("silver",""," "..zone.." -- "..r.." rooms"); any = true end if not any then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: nothing recorded yet -- go walk somewhere") end end
local function click_button (key) local zone = cur_zone() if key == "mermaid" then export_mermaid(zone) elseif key == "json" then export_json(zone) elseif key == "new" then show_unexplored(zone) elseif key == "list" then list_areas() end paint() end
local function rebuild () layout_metrics() WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] WindowAddHotspot(win, "ex_"..b.key, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, "ex_over", "ex_out", "", "", "ex_click", b.label, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h) paint() end
function ex_click (flags, id) click_button(id:gsub("^ex_", "")) end function ex_over (flags, id) if hovered ~= id then hovered = id; paint() end end function ex_out (flags, id) if hovered == id then hovered = nil; paint() end end
function ex_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then if WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Hide") == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- command ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function help () ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer v"..PVER.." -- maps areas as you walk them") ColourNote("yellow","","explore show/hide the window") ColourNote("yellow","","explore mermaid | json export the current area") ColourNote("yellow","","explore new rooms here with unexplored exits") ColourNote("yellow","","explore list areas recorded") ColourNote("yellow","","explore clear forget the current area") end
function ex_cmd (name, line, wildcards) local arg = (wildcards[1] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$",""):lower() local zone = cur_zone() if arg == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); paint() end elseif arg == "help" or arg == "?" then help() elseif arg == "mermaid" then export_mermaid(zone) elseif arg == "json" then export_json(zone) elseif arg == "new" then show_unexplored(zone) elseif arg == "list" then list_areas() elseif arg == "clear" then if zone and cfg.areas[zone] then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: type 'explore clear yes' to forget "..zone) end elseif arg == "clear yes" then if zone then cfg.areas[zone] = nil; last_msg = "cleared "..zone; paint(); ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: cleared "..zone) end else ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: unknown '"..arg.."'. Try 'explore help'.") end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end; cfg.areas = cfg.areas or {} end end windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_right, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = ex_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 500 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, MINW, 40, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0) rebuild() record() -- capture the room we log in to WindowShow(win, true) end
function OnPluginSaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end
function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false); WindowDelete(win) end
